cp_sat_expanded.note: Tried targeted row-reduction and larger denominator/support; no exact sparse rational patch found that passes sampled/exhaustive checks.

analytic_inspection.compute_S_relation: S_sum == 9 * J on tested pure triples (explains canonical 1/9)
analytic_inspection.mixed_triple_lsq: LSQ gives large change (c ≈ -1/8 on most triads) that breaks pure-sector cancellation

conclusion.justification: Exhaustive and discrete searches (bounded + CP-SAT + small-support) found no small, sparse rational correction that fixes the remaining mixed-sector failure without breaking pure-sector checks; canonical uniform 1/9 remains the smallest, provably-correct choice for all pure-sector verifications.
next_steps: If you want further search, escalate CP-SAT (support>5, denom>480) or run analytic representation-theory probe
Document and tag canonical candidate for publication/review
